name: claw-score
tagline: Audits and refreshes the OpenClaw maturity scorecard (taxonomy, scores, QA evidence) while excluding maintainer-private data.
verdict: Thorough, safety-conscious scoring workflow with clear file ownership and a well-defined output artifact. Gaps: no failure-path guidance for validation/build steps, no example for the required dotted coverage-ID format, no exclusion guidance, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No exclusions or pointers to other skills for out-of-scope cases anywhere in the doc.
No guidance for schema-validation failures, pnpm command failures, or missing evidence artifacts.
Dotted namespace.behavior coverage-ID format is required but never shown with a worked example.
